name: Domesticated Chick-Pea Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the chopped parsley and salt to a food processor or blender.
2. Puree until the garlic is finely chopped (if preparing by hand, finely dice and mash the garlic, then mix with the other ingredients).
3. Add the chick-peas and continue mixing to a smooth paste.
4. Garnish with the remaining chopped parsley.
5. Serve at room temperature or chilled. Makes about 4 1/2 cups of dip. Suggested dippers: Pita bread, toast triangles, scallions, plain crackers, red cabbage.
